```
ERROR at //third_party/dawn/src/dawn/native/vulkan/ShaderModuleVk.cpp:71:11: Can't include this header from here.
#include "tint/utils/result.h"
          ^------------------
The target:
  //third_party/dawn/src/dawn/native:sources
is including a file from the target:
  //third_party/dawn/src/tint/utils:utils

It's usually best to depend directly on the destination target.
In some cases, the destination target is considered a subcomponent
of an intermediate target. In this case, the intermediate target
should depend publicly on the destination to forward the ability
to include headers.

Dependency chain (there may also be others):
  //third_party/dawn/src/dawn/native:sources -->
  //third_party/dawn/src/tint/api/common:common --[private]-->
  //third_party/dawn/src/tint/utils:utils

```
#### More information can be found in the stdout.

text:
Change has been successfully rebased and submitted as 905c3b40eecb0a00ad2baa530394a560a4dcbc9a

4 is the latest approved patch-set.
The change was submitted with unreviewed changes in the following files:

```
The name of the file: src/dawn/native/d3d11/DeviceInfoD3D11.cpp
Insertions: 2, Deletions: 1.

@@ -47,7 +47,8 @@
 
     info.supportsPartialConstantBufferUpdate = options.ConstantBufferPartialUpdate;
 
-    // Return error if the device doesn't support binding constant buffers with non-zero offsets.
+    // TODO(405401229): Return error if the device doesn't support binding constant buffers with
+    // non-zero offsets.
     DAWN_INVALID_IF(!options.ConstantBufferOffsetting, "ConstantBufferOffsetting is not supported");
 
     D3D11_FEATURE_DATA_D3D11_OPTIONS2 options2;
```
